title: Binance.US Appoints Stephen Gregory as Chief Executive Officer, Succeeding Norman Reed
message_html: Binance.US Appoints Stephen Gregory as Chief Executive Officer, Succeeding Norman Reed ...
snippet: Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): Binance. US announced the appointment of Stephen Gregory as Chief Executive Officer, succeeding Norman Reed, who moved to an advisory role on March 9. Gregory previously served as U.S. CEO of Currency. com and held compliance leadership roles at Gemini and CEX. IO. htt

title: TYTL Closes Strategic Investment from Strobe and Fifth Era; Launches Blockchain-Based Fractional Real Estate Equity Platform with Beeline and Anchorage Digital Bank Partnerships
